title: Superb VS
description: Fixes hitreg between Superb Warfare and Valkyrien Skies.
body:
___ ### Fixes hitreg between Superb Warfare and Valkyrien Skies. ![Mod Loader](https://img.shields.io/badge/mod_loader-forge-ffe8e9?style=for-the-badge&labelColor=ffced2) ![Environment](https://img.shields.io/badge/environment-client_|_server-ffe8e9?style=for-the-badge&labelColor=ffced2) [![Bug Reports](https://img.shields.io/github/issues/kawaiicakes/SuperbVS?style=for-the-badge&logo=github&labelColor=ffe8e9&color=ffced2)](https://github.com/kawaiicakes/SuperbVS/issues) [![CurseForge](https://img.shields.io/curseforge/dt/1288304?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&labelColor=ffceea&color=ffe8f5)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/superbvs) [![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/foPG2Wmv?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&labelColor=ffceea&color=ffe8f5)](https://modrinth.com/project/superbvs) ---
# 📖 Information This mod fixes the hitreg between Superb Warfare and Valkyrien Skies 2. I'll (hopefully) be actively maintaining it and adding more bug fixes as the need arises. Anyway, I'd recommend using the newest version of Superb with this. The newer versions seem to have added fixes which improve block destruction calculations against ships. --- # 📝 In-Development Features - Fix block destruction/penetration calculations from things like the Javelin or naval guns (1.1.0-beta) - Neoforge version if/when VS2 for 1.21 is released
